# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 1
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.get_mr_info: &get_mr_info
  - |
    if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
      export MR_TITLE=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" | \
        jq -r '.title')
      export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" | \
        jq -r '.description')
      export MR_AUTHOR=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" | \
        jq -r '.author.username')
      export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" | \
        jq -r '.source_branch')
      export MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" | \
        jq -r '.target_branch')
    else
      export MR_TITLE="Direct commit to ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
      export MR_DESCRIPTION="No merge request associated"
      export MR_AUTHOR="${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}"
      export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
      export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}"
    fi
  - echo "MR Title: $MR_TITLE"
  - echo "MR Author: $MR_AUTHOR"

.save_mr_info: &save_mr_info
  - |
    cat > mr_info.env << EOF
    MR_TITLE=${MR_TITLE}
    MR_DESCRIPTION=${MR_DESCRIPTION}
    MR_AUTHOR=${MR_AUTHOR}
    MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}
    MR_TARGET_BRANCH=${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}
    MR_IID=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
    COMMIT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    PIPELINE_ID=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
    EOF

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - *get_mr_info
  script:
    - echo "Building application for: $MR_TITLE"
    - *save_mr_info
    - |
      cat > build_info.txt << EOF
      ========================================
      Build Information
      ========================================
      Feature: ${MR_TITLE}
      Description: ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
      Author: ${MR_AUTHOR}
      Branch: ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH} -> ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}
      Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      Build Time: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
      ========================================
      EOF
    - cat build_info.txt
    - mkdir -p build
    - echo "Build artifact for: $MR_TITLE" > build/app.txt
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr_info.env
    paths:
      - build/
      - build_info.txt
      - mr_info.env
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
  script:
    - echo "Testing feature: $MR_TITLE"
    - |
      cat > test_report.txt << EOF
      Test Report
      Feature: ${MR_TITLE}
      Status: PASSED
      Tests Run: 100
      Passed: 100
      Failed: 0
      EOF
    - cat test_report.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test_report.txt
    expire_in: 1 week

docker_build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - *get_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//')
      export DOCKER_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
      echo "DOCKER_TAG=${DOCKER_TAG}" >> docker.env
    - |
      cat > Dockerfile << 'EOF'
      FROM alpine:latest
      ARG MR_TITLE
      ARG MR_DESCRIPTION
      ARG BUILD_DATE
      ARG COMMIT_SHA
      LABEL mr.title="${MR_TITLE}"
      LABEL mr.description="${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
      LABEL build.date="${BUILD_DATE}"
      LABEL commit.sha="${COMMIT_SHA}"
      RUN echo "Feature: ${MR_TITLE}" > /app_info.txt
      CMD ["cat", "/app_info.txt"]
      EOF
    - |
      docker build \
        --build-arg MR_TITLE="${MR_TITLE}" \
        --build-arg MR_DESCRIPTION="${MR_DESCRIPTION}" \
        --build-arg BUILD_DATE="$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" \
        --build-arg COMMIT_SHA="${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" \
        -t myapp:${DOCKER_TAG} .
    - echo "Built Docker image with tag: ${DOCKER_TAG}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: docker.env

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - build
    - test
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//')
      export DEPLOYMENT_TAG="staging-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
      export DEPLOYMENT_NAME="staging-$(echo $SANITIZED_MR_TITLE | cut -c1-30)"
    - echo "Deploying to staging: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
    - echo "Deployment tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - |
      cat > deployment_manifest.yaml << EOF
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: ${DEPLOYMENT_NAME}
        labels:
          app: myapp
          feature: ${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}
          commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
        annotations:
          mr.title: "${MR_TITLE}"
          mr.description: "${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
          mr.author: "${MR_AUTHOR}"
          deployment.tag: "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
      spec:
        replicas: 1
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: myapp
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: myapp
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: app
              image: myapp:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
              env:
              - name: FEATURE_NAME
                value: "${MR_TITLE}"
      EOF
    - cat deployment_manifest.yaml
    - |
      cat > staging_deployment.env << EOF
      DEPLOYMENT_TAG=${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      DEPLOYMENT_NAME=${DEPLOYMENT_NAME}
      ENVIRONMENT=staging
      EOF
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: staging_deployment.env
    paths:
      - deployment_manifest.yaml
    expire_in: 1 week
  environment:
    name: staging
    deployment_tier: staging
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - build
    - test
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - *get_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//')
      export DEPLOYMENT_TAG="prod-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
      export RELEASE_NAME="v$(date +%Y%m%d)-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "Deploying to production with tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - |
      cat > release_notes.md << EOF
      # Release: ${RELEASE_NAME}
      
      ## Feature
      **${MR_TITLE}**
      
      ## Description
      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
      
      ## Details
      - **Author**: ${MR_AUTHOR}
      - **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      - **Pipeline**: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      - **Branch**: ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH} -> ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}
      - **Deployment Tag**: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      - **Date**: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
      
      ## Changes
      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
      EOF
    - cat release_notes.md
    - |
      cat > production_deployment.env << EOF
      DEPLOYMENT_TAG=${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      RELEASE_NAME=${RELEASE_NAME}
      ENVIRONMENT=production
      EOF
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: production_deployment.env
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
    expire_in: 30 days
  environment:
    name: production
    deployment_tier: production
  when: manual
  only:
    - main

create_release:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - deploy_production
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - *get_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//')
      RELEASE_TAG="v$(date +%Y%m%d.%H%M%S)-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
    - |
      RELEASE_DESCRIPTION=$(cat << EOF
      ## ${MR_TITLE}
      
      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
      
      ---
      **Author**: ${MR_AUTHOR}
      **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}
      **Pipeline**: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      EOF
      )
    - |
      curl --request POST \
        --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" \
        --data "tag_name=${RELEASE_TAG}" \
        --data "ref=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" \
        --data "name=${MR_TITLE}" \
        --data "description=${RELEASE_DESCRIPTION}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases" || true
    - echo "Created release: $RELEASE_TAG"
  only:
    - main

slack_notification:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        SLACK_MESSAGE=$(cat << EOF
      {
        "text": "Build Completed",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🚀 Build Completed: ${MR_TITLE}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Feature:*\n${MR_TITLE}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Author:*\n${MR_AUTHOR}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Branch:*\n${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH} → ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Commit:*\n${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "actions",
            "elements": [
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View Pipeline"
                },
                "url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
              },
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View MR"
                },
                "url": "${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "${SLACK_MESSAGE}" \
          "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"
        echo "Slack notification sent"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not set, skipping notification"
      fi
  when: always
  allow_failure: true

email_notification:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - deploy_staging
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
  script:
    - |
      cat > deployment_email.html << EOF
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
      <head>
        <style>
          body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
          .container { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; }
          .header { background-color: #4CAF50; color: white; padding: 20px; text-align: center; }
          .content { padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9; }
          .info { margin: 10px 0; }
          .label { font-weight: bold; }
          .footer { padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: #666; }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <div class="container">
          <div class="header">
            <h1>Deployment Notification</h1>
          </div>
          <div class="content">
            <h2>${MR_TITLE}</h2>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Description:</span><br>
              ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
            </div>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Author:</span> ${MR_AUTHOR}
            </div>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Environment:</span> ${ENVIRONMENT}
            </div>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Deployment Tag:</span> ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
            </div>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Commit:</span> ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
            </div>
            <div class="info">
              <span class="label">Pipeline:</span> <a href="${CI_PIPELINE_URL}">${CI_PIPELINE_ID}</a>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="footer">
            <p>Automated deployment notification from GitLab CI/CD</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </body>
      </html>
      EOF
    - cat deployment_email.html
    - echo "Email notification prepared"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_email.html
    expire_in: 1 week
  when: on_success
  allow_failure: true

generate_changelog:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
  script:
    - |
      CHANGELOG_FILE="CHANGELOG_$(date +%Y%m%d).md"
      cat > ${CHANGELOG_FILE} << EOF
      # Changelog - $(date +"%Y-%m-%d")
      
      ## ${MR_TITLE}
      
      **Merge Request**: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
      **Author**: @${MR_AUTHOR}
      **Commit**: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      
      ### Description
      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}
      
      ### Branch
      ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH} → ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}
      
      ### Pipeline
      [Pipeline #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})
      
      ---
      EOF
    - cat ${CHANGELOG_FILE}
    - |
      if [ -f CHANGELOG.md ]; then
        cat ${CHANGELOG_FILE} CHANGELOG.md > CHANGELOG_temp.md
        mv CHANGELOG_temp.md CHANGELOG.md
      else
        mv ${CHANGELOG_FILE} CHANGELOG.md
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - CHANGELOG.md
    expire_in: never
  only:
    - main
